title: BGSpec Floor 0 Edge
description: Defines a single edge at Floor 0 (Physical / Logical layer) of a Bumble Grid Specification document. Edges may be produced by automated extractors (k8s manifest analysis, Istio VirtualService/DestinationRule) or declared manually by a human. The 'extractionSource' field is always required and must honestly reflect the origin. Manual edges are permitted at Floor 0 exclusively to cover runtime relationships (e.g. Workload-to-Workload traffic) that are invisible to static infrastructure manifests.

data.description: Cytoscape-compatible data envelope. All BGSpec edge fields live here.

id.description: Globally unique edge identifier within this BGSpec document. Kubernetes extractors use '<source>|<target>|<bgRelation>|<inferred>' (e.g. 'cluster/main/k8s/.../svc|cluster/main/k8s/.../deploy|Exposes|false'). Slug form with double hyphens is also valid.

source.description: ID of the source node. Must reference a node 'id' present in the same BGSpec document.

target.description: ID of the target node. Must reference a node 'id' present in the same BGSpec document.

floor.description: Floor number. Always 0 for Floor 0 edges.

bgRelation.description: BGSpec's own edge taxonomy. Describes the nature of the relationship between two Floor 0 nodes, independent of provider or protocol.

extractionSource.description: Declares the origin of this edge. 'k8s-manifest' and 'istio-manifest' are produced by automated extractors. 'manual' is human-declared. This field is the primary trust signal for consumers of the graph.

inferred.description: True if this edge was derived by logical inference (e.g. label selector matching between a Service and a Deployment) rather than an explicit reference in a manifest. False if the relationship is an explicit declaration (e.g. an Ingress backend field pointing to a Service by name). Always false for manual edges.

label.description: Optional human-readable label shown on the edge in a renderer. Extractor may populate this (e.g. port number or route path). Human may override for manual edges.

meta.description: Operational metadata for this edge. Human-editable for manual edges; extractor-populated otherwise.

description.description: Free-text explanation of why this connection exists. Especially valuable for manual edges where the relationship is not obvious from manifests.

extractedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this edge was last extracted. Omit for manual edges.

extractorVersion.description: Version of the BGSpec extractor that produced this edge. Omit for manual edges.

examples.comment: Automated — Ingress routes to a Service (explicit manifest reference, not inferred)
Automated — Service exposes a Deployment (inferred via label selector matching)
Automated — Workload mounts a Secret (explicit volumeMount declaration)

Manual — cross-namespace runtime call invisible to k8s manifests. Persist line styling in the root document styleMap.byId["k8s-payments-api--calls--k8s-identity-api"].edge (extractors must not write styleMap).

meta.description: Payments API calls Identity API to validate JWT tokens on every request.

examples.comment: Istio — VirtualService declares weighted routing between two service versions
